title: From Subsistence to Superstores: Tracing Consumerism's Journey

questions.sentence: Consumerism the idea that consuming goods and services is central to an economy and culture has undergone a remarkable transformation throughout human history
A significant paradigm shift occurred with the Industrial Revolution in the 18th and 19th centuries
The post World War II economic boom further accelerated consumerism particularly in Western countries
In the late 20th and early 21st centuries the digital revolution brought another seismic change
Today consumerism is a ubiquitous force deeply embedded in our global economy and daily lives
